note: Three reproducible MQ measurements: one Python task, one cross-repo contract task, and one unsupported shell task with explicit fallback. Measured facts are kept separate from inferred savings. Per ADR-009 these are measurement records, not observation/promotion evidence. Public-safe: repo-relative paths and symbol names only.

measurements.task: trace render_pack in the mqobsidian context-pack generator

baseline.description: Read scripts/generate-context-pack.py in full to locate and understand render_pack.

inferred.note: Inferred from 66 vs 321 first-read lines; not a runtime measurement.

measurements.task: trace the repo-review.v1 producer symbol (contract map, Delivery B)

baseline.description: Read repo_signal/review_export.py in full; join to the mqobsidian consumer by hand.

inferred.note: Inferred from 35 vs 103 first-read lines. CodeGraph gives repo-local symbol evidence; the producer→consumer join comes from the contract map, not a federated graph.

measurements.task: find the shell `log` helper definition in macos-scripts

baseline.description: CodeGraph returned only unrelated Python symbols (changelog_latest, _DIALOG_CSS); the shell `log()` helper lives in 53 unindexed shell files. grep found the definition directly.

inferred.note: Not applicable — CodeGraph cannot index shell, so there is no CodeGraph-assisted path to compare. The fallback grep is the only path.

verification.command: n/a — discovery-only measurement, no correctness asserted

fallback.reason: shell is unsupported upstream (Delivery A coverage: 219 shell files unindexed in macos-scripts); fall back to grep/source reads
